_doc: Fixture for /chat + /dev/components. Documents the API message schema chat.js renders. Backend (SPEC-02) returns {messages:[...]} from /api/web/chat/message and /poll. TODO(backend): wire real endpoints; these shapes are the contract.

initial_transcript.author: bot
initial_transcript.text: Hey — I can see you're on **v4.2.1**. What's going on today?

demo_all_kinds.author: bot
demo_all_kinds.text:
Here's how to restore a purchase:
- Open **Store → Restore**
- Sign in with the same account
- Wait ~30s for the sync
More detail here: [Restoring purchases](https://support.primerush.gg/kb/article/restore-purchases)

demo_all_kinds.author: player
demo_all_kinds.text: I did that but the skin still isn't showing.
Add your SID and I can pull up your purchase history.

demo_all_kinds.author: bot
demo_all_kinds.text: This article covers the exact steps for your case:

demo_all_kinds.note: A human will take it from here. We'll reply here and at your ticket page.

demo_all_kinds.text: A small credit for the wait.
By the way — 300 wins is no joke. Genuinely impressive. Thanks for sticking with us.
Chat is busy — browse help articles or leave a ticket.
